description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle featuring a collapsible stock, a detachable box magazine, and a prominent pistol grip. The receiver and handguard are finished in a combination of matte black and dark green, with metallic accents on the buffer tube and barrel. The handguard has ribbed sections for improved grip and heat dissipation, while the top rail extends the full length of the receiver for mounting optics or accessories. Iron sights are mounted at the front and rear, providing basic aiming capability. The muzzle is fitted with a simple flash hider, and the overall design suggests a lightweight, modular firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, and iron sights, finished in black and green with metallic accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and full-length top rail with iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, flash hider, and ribbed handguard, with the barrel and sights aligned.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and buffer tube, with the top rail and rear sight visible.
